calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-21-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Two Minors.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclaire.
Baron Miller, Esq. for Petitioners: Jamar Lee Williams and Tia Marie Amador, present as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Jamar Lee Sheppard, Jr. and Jalen Leonard Sheppard.
Petitioners were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minors to: Jamar Lee Williams, Jr. and Jalen Leonard Williams.
Decree signed in open court.
